prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-WHTLADLE-YJJ-74597-72-FBA Product Type: SPOON Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Cream Wheat Straw Ladle with Stainless Steel Handle Kitchen Utensils, 13 Inch Description: Want to step up your cooking and meal prep game? Then you need the Beille ladle made with wheat straw. These serving spoons are made with an innovative plant based material called wheat straw that mimics classic kitchen tools without the harmful byproducts of traditional plastic.

Wheat straw is a bioplastic that is not made from fossil fuels making it more sustainable and a great zero waste option. It’s certified BPA free and is food-grade safe so you can count on it for food and meal prep. The spoon is dishwasher safe for easy clean up after use.

The large kitchen ladle features a sturdy handle made of durable, corrosion resistant stainless steel that won’t rust so you can count on it to last. The handle comes with a slot for easy hanging storage if preferred, and it comes in a trendy and warm cream color and matte finish that will fit with any existing kitchen decor.

Every kitchen needs a reliable, durable ladle. With the Beille wheat straw plant based spoon, you can cook and meal prep with peace of mind knowing you’re doing your part to protect yourself, your family, and the planet from harmful materials. Search Terms: kitchen utensils set cooking baking supplies tools food meal prep soup ladle spoons punch bowl kitchen starter set serveware wedding house warming gifts new home college dorm room essentials chef restaurant equipment wheat straw sustainable products Features: - ESSENTIAL KITCHEN LADLE: Beille large serving spoon is a must have kitchen tool for cooking, meal, and food prep; Long handle with a wide spoon base will quickly and safely mix food and ingredients while cooking and keep your hands safe from heat - PLANT BASED MATERIAL: Unique kitchen ladle is made of bioplastic wheat straw; plant based material not made from fossil fuels making it more sustainable; Innovative material is a great zero waste option; Certified BPA free - SOLID AND DURABLE: Beille wheat straw large spoon mimics traditional plastic cooking spoons and utensils without harmful byproducts; Slotted head ladle is dishwasher safe and can be used with both hot and cold food ingredients - STAINLESS STEEL HANDLE: Sturdy handle made of durable, corrosion resistant stainless steel that won’t rust so you can count on it to last; Comes with handy slot in handle for easy hang storage if preferred; Trendy cream color will fit nicely with any kitchen decor - SPECIFICATIONS: Colors: cream, chrome; Material: 60% wheat straw, 40% polypropylene, stainless steel; Dimensions: 11.5 x 2.4” inches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 13in Cream Wheat Straw Ladle with Stainless Steel

tokens.name: Wheat Straw Ladle with Stainless Steel Handle

openai.item_name: Beille 13 in Cream Wheat Straw Ladle

anthropic.title_differentiation: Plant-Based Wheat Straw, BPA-Free, Dishwasher Safe, Rust-Resistant Stainless Steel Handle, Sustainable Kitchen Utensil

openai.title_differentiation: Plant Based, BPA-Free, Dishwasher Safe, Stainless Steel Handle, Heat Resistant, Sustainable, Zero Waste
